title: Kapelle Sogn Benedetg File-Level Provenance Inventory
purpose: Record that no local Sogn Benedetg media/model files are currently available for file-level provenance review. This keeps the Swiss timber pilot link-only until reviewed local or generated files exist.

policy.rule: Public promotion requires concrete files plus file-level source URL, generation/build evidence, author/creator, license evidence, attribution decision and human review.

next_actions: Search local private books, ETH/HSLU lectures and OneDrive library for Sogn Benedetg source material.
Add only link-only fingerprints or private review extracts until rights are clarified.
Generate own study assets only after source basis and review status are explicit.
